rationale: Review 1 would lead to the better PR for placement: the diff’s public API is generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra convolution material with no algebraic-group objects, so moving it to lower-level Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra files is a real improvement confirmed from the shown code. Review 2 catches only the placement of one helper lemma, leaving the main public declarations in the questionable FunctorOfPoints file.
